title: Manage bulk invoice line items
excerpt: Add, update and remove multiple invoice line items with the Invoices API. You can edit multiple line items on an invoice by bulk adding, updating, and removing line items with the [Invoices API](https://docs.stripe.com/api/invoices.md). To update an invoice, you need to create one first. You can [create an invoice in the Dashboard ](https://docs.stripe.com/invoicing/dashboard.md#create-invoice)or with the [Invoices API](https://docs.stripe.com/api/invoices/create.md). You can only update invoices in a [draft state](https://docs.stripe.com/invoicing/overview.md#invoice-lifecycle). To create multiple line items on the same invoice, reference the [invoice ID](https://docs.stripe.com/api/invoices/object.md#invoice_object-).…
